title: Jinx & Minx Tower Escape
description: Its Halloween, and the skeleton Jinx and Minx bunnies are trapped high in an abandoned tower! Its up to you to guide them through spooky corridors, haunted rooms and puzzles, collecting the keys and the candy to get the bunnies out and back together! Website Developer https://playonline.top/
instructions: Use the arrow keys to move the characters and left click or touch to interact with objects
